message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as C1
participant "Frontend" as F1
participant "Backend" as B1
participant "Client" as C2
participant "Frontend" as F2
participant "Backend" as B2

C1 --> F1 : 1 Get post by url
F1 --> B1 : 2 GET: /post/{id}
B1 --> F1 : 3 post
F1 --> C2 : 4 show created post page

@enduml
